manifest_source: Gradle merged release manifest including dependency contributions

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
declared_permissions.purpose: Basic network connectivity state used by bundled networking and authentication components.

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.INTERNET
declared_permissions.purpose: HTTPS access to DIREKT API and approved authentication/notification services.

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
declared_permissions.purpose: Allows visible push notifications on Android 13+ only after a later approved participant push activation. RC4 keeps participant registration and the runtime permission request source-controlled off; the managed synthetic canary grants permission directly on its test emulator.

declared_permissions.name: android.permission.WAKE_LOCK
declared_permissions.purpose: Firebase Messaging dependency support for bounded background message processing; this is a normal permission with no user runtime prompt.

declared_permissions.name: com.google.android.c2dm.permission.RECEIVE
declared_permissions.purpose: Firebase Messaging transport permission contributed by the reviewed FCM SDK for receiving messages addressed to the application.

declared_permissions.name: com.google.android.providers.gsf.permission.READ_GSERVICES
declared_permissions.purpose: Google/Firebase service support contributed by the reviewed Firebase dependency surface.

declared_permissions.name: com.kudzimusar.direkt.DYNAMIC_RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED_PERMISSION
declared_permissions.purpose: AndroidX-generated protection for non-exported dynamic receivers inside the app boundary.

current_play_declaration_assessment.reason: POST_NOTIFICATIONS is the only user-controlled runtime permission and does not use a restricted/sensitive Play permission declaration form. The current preauthorization build keeps its runtime request and participant FCM registration disabled. WAKE_LOCK and com.google.android.c2dm.permission.RECEIVE are reviewed non-runtime permissions contributed by Firebase Messaging; the remaining merged permissions are normal, dependency-contributed, or app-scoped.

planned_feature_rule.location: Manual area search remains the required fallback. Do not add background location. Foreground location requires a separate evidence-backed change and Play review.
planned_feature_rule.camera_and_media: Prefer system photo/file pickers and scoped access rather than broad storage permissions.
planned_feature_rule.phone_sms: Do not request SMS or call-log permissions for OTP or contact handoff.
planned_feature_rule.contacts: Not required for MVP. Use minimum-scope platform picker if a future approved feature genuinely needs contacts.
planned_feature_rule.notifications: POST_NOTIFICATIONS is declared for the reviewed FCM client path, but the current participant runtime request remains source-controlled disabled. Before participant activation, validate rationale, denial fallback, opt-out/token deletion and exact release-candidate behavior.

submission_boundary: Play Console makes the final permissions determination from the uploaded AAB. Recheck this inventory against the exact release candidate merged manifest before submission.
